check_script_lines: "read cpu user nice system idle iowait irq softirq steal guest guest_nice < /proc/stat; "
"total1=$((user + nice + system + idle + iowait + irq + softirq + steal)); "
"read cpu user nice system idle iowait irq softirq steal guest guest_nice < /proc/stat; "
"total2=$((user + nice + system + idle + iowait + irq + softirq + steal)); "
message='CPU 사용률 점검 명령 실행에 실패했습니다.',
message='CPU 사용률 출력 형식을 해석할 수 없습니다.',

results.raw_output:
[점검 단계 1]
 - 실행 명령어: bash -lc 'read cpu user nice system idle iowait irq softirq steal guest guest_nice < /proc/stat; total1=$((user + nice + system + idle + iowait + irq + softirq + steal)); idle1=$((idle + iowait)); sleep 1; read cpu user nice system idle iowait irq softirq steal guest guest_nice < /proc/stat; total2=$((user + nice + system + idle + iowait + irq + softirq + steal)); idle2=$((idle + iowait)); total_diff=$((total2 - total1)); idle_diff=$((idle2 - idle1)); cpu_usage=$(awk "BEGIN {printf \"%.2f\", (1 - $idle_diff / $total_diff) * 100}"); echo "CPU Usage: ${cpu_usage}%"'
 - 명령 종료코드: rc=0 (정상 종료)
 - 출력 내용(stdout): CPU Usage: 0.37%
 - 출력 내용(stderr): Warning: Permanently added '192.168.1.123' (ED25519) to the list of known hosts.
